dialects: paraphrase 1 - innocuous rewording, same register and meaning|paraphrase 2 - another innocuous rewording, same register|paraphrase 3 - reorder the clauses, keep every key word|paraphrase 4 - swap function words only, same content|paraphrase 5 - minimal rewording, same register
_note: paraphrase robustness: 5 innocuous rewordings x 10 baselines, term held fixed
